name: Phone calls
snippet: Vapi makes it easy to build voice agents that can make and receive phone calls . In under 5 minutes, you'll create a voice assistant and start talking to it ...

name: Phone Number Hooks
snippet: Example : Say Message on Call Ringing. This example shows how to play a message when a call is ringing: $, curl -X PATCH "https:// api . vapi . ai / phone - number /<id>" ...

name: Give Your OpenClaw Agent a Voice: Adding Phone Calls
snippet: Your agent will call the Vapi API, provision a number, and give you its ID. Or via the API directly: curl -X POST https://api.vapi.ai/phone-number \ -H ...

name: Create Call
snippet: curl -X POST https:// api . vapi . ai / call \. 2, -H "Authorization: Bearer <token> ... This is the phone number that will be used for the call . To use a ...

name: How To Create A Voice Assistant Full Tutorial (Vapi x Make)
snippet: I'm going to show you how to trigger the uh voice AI calls using a web hook request.
